info.name: Gestor de Turnos — E2E
info.description:
End-to-end test collection for the 'Gestor de turnos' NestJS API.

## Ejecución recomendada
1. Asegurate de que el backend corra en `{{base_url}}` (por default `http://localhost:3000`).
2. Corré el seed: `cd server && npx prisma db seed`.
3. Importá también el environment `Gestor de Turnos — Local`.
4. Abrí el Collection Runner (Runner) y corré la colección en orden.

## Orden de carpetas
1. 🔐 Auth → 2. 👑 Admin → 3. 🏢 Business → 4. 💇 Services → 5. 🗓️ Schedules →
6. 👥 Admin/Employees → 7. 👤 Users → 8. 📅 Bookings → 9. ❌ Edge cases → 10. 🧹 Cleanup

exec: // Global pre-request: nothing yet. Hook-ready for future logging.
// Global test: log status for each request when running in Runner

item.name: 1. 🔐 Auth

request.description: Self-signup endpoint. Always creates users with role=CLIENT (enforced server-side).

exec: // Generate unique email per run so we don't collide with previous test runs

request.description: Authenticate with seeded admin. Requires `npx prisma db seed` to have been run.
Edge case: invalid credentials must return 401.

item.description: Login with seeded ADMIN; register + login a CLIENT. Captures tokens into collection variables.

item.name: 2. 👑 Admin — Self & Metrics

request.description: Run this AFTER creating a business so {{businessId}} is set.

item.description: Admin profile, dashboard and metrics. Needs {{adminToken}}.

item.name: 3. 🏢 Business
item.description: Create the test business and store its id in {{businessId}}.

item.name: 4. 💇 Services
item.description: Services CRUD scoped to the test business.

item.name: 5. 🗓️ Schedules
item.description: Business operating hours. Schedule for Monday 10-19 (after update) is used by booking flow.

item.name: 6. 👥 Admin — Employees
item.description: Employee lifecycle + login as that employee.

item.name: 8. 📅 Bookings (e2e)

request.description: Uses CLIENT token. Checks which employees are free for the computed slot.

exec: // Compute next Monday at 10:00 local + 30min end (matches schedule Mon 10-19)
const daysUntilMon = ((8 - day) % 7) || 7; // next Monday (not today)

item.description: Happy path: CLIENT creates booking, ADMIN confirms, EMPLOYEE completes.

request.description: CLIENT role has no permission to create businesses.
Missing required: durationMin, price, businessId. ValidationPipe should reject.

item.name: 10. 🧹 Cleanup
item.description: Deletes everything created in this run. Run only when you want a clean DB state.
